channel.title: AI Unfiltered
channel.description: Chinese AI • Open Source • Security • Incidents. Signal, not noise.

item.title: PhyDrawGen: Physically Grounded Diagram Generation from Natural Language
item.description: arXiv:2605.30512v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Generating physics diagrams from text requires strict adherence to physical laws. While current generative models produce visually plausible outputs, they systematically hallucinate force vectors, ignore conservation laws, and violate geometric...

item.title: Physically Viable World Models: A Case for Query-Conditioned Embodied AI
item.description: arXiv:2605.30542v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: World models for embodied AI must be physically viable: constructed to answer intervention queries by representing the physical structure governing action outcomes, rather than merely predicting future observations. Existing observation-predictive...

item.title: Transforming and Encoding FTS for SAT Solving: What Helps, What Hurts (Extended Version)
item.description: arXiv:2605.30563v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Factored tasks are a classical planning representation that extends SAS+ with limited forms of disjunctive preconditions, conditional effects, and angelic nondeterminism. This allows for a more compact representation of tasks than traditional...

item.title: Procedural Generation of First Person Shooter Maps using Map-Elites
item.description: arXiv:2605.30570v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We investigate the application of MAP-Elites (a well-known quality diversity algorithm) to design levels for First-Person Shooter (FPS) games. We consider two well-known map representations (All-Black and Grid-Graph) and introduce two novel...

item.title: Uncertainty-Aware and Temporally Regulated Expert Advice in Reinforcement Learning for Autonomous Driving
item.description: arXiv:2605.30576v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Exploration in reinforcement learning for autonomous driving is inherently unsafe: agents must experience novel behaviors to learn, yet exploration can lead to collisions or off-road driving. We propose an uncertainty-aware framework that leverages...

item.title: QASM-Eval: A Dataset to Train and Evaluate LLMs on OpenQASM-3 Beyond Quantum Circuits
item.description: arXiv:2605.30358v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Quantum computing remains in the Noisy Intermediate-Scale Quantum (NISQ) era, where the performance is highly constrained to noise. Addressing the limitation often requires hardware-facing capabilities beyond gate-sequence circuit specification,...

item.title: Gait2Hip-60: A Unified Deep Learning Benchmark for Predicting Hip Muscle Forces and Joint Moments from Multi-Cadence Gait Kinematics
item.description: arXiv:2605.30374v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Estimating hip muscle forces and joint moments during gait typically relies on musculoskeletal simulation, which is informative but time-consuming and difficult to apply in clinical settings. This study developed a deep learning framework to predict...

item.title: Unicorn: Scaling High-Dimensional Time Series Forecasting via Universal Correlation Modeling
item.description: arXiv:2605.30376v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Modern time series architectures face a fundamental trade-off: channel-independent models scale well with increasing data volume but ignore critical inter-channel dependencies, while channel-dependent models are expressive but remain...

item.title: When LLMs Learn to Be Consistently Wrong: A Multi-Model Study of Linear Representations of Synthetic Deception
item.description: arXiv:2605.30381v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Deceptive alignment, in which models maintain accurate internal representations while deliberately producing false outputs, remains a central challenge in AI safety. While strategic deception is the primary long-term concern, synthetic dishonesty -...

item.title: LLMs Without Deep Neural Networks: New Architecture, Benefits and Case Study
item.description: arXiv:2605.30385v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The purpose of this article is to provide validation to my deep neural network alternative in the context of LLMs. Very recently, there has been a significant interest by Chinese researchers in a model called RBF network, as a substitute to standard...

item.title: Protocol for evaluating ChatGPT in biomedical association generation and verification using a RAG-enabled, cross-model majority voting workflow
item.description: arXiv:2605.30400v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We present a protocol to evaluate ChatGPT's ability to generate disease-centric biomedical associations. It outlines how we generate the associations, validate the biological entities using biomedical ontologies, and verify associations using...

item.title: Exploring Autonomous Agentic Data Engineering for Model Specialization
item.description: arXiv:2605.30407v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated strong performance on general tasks, while often struggling to adapt to specialized domains without high-quality domain-specific data. Existing LLM-based data curation methods primarily rely on...

item.title: Domain Adaptation and Reasoning Frameworks in Language Models: A Controlled Experiment with Historical Cosmology
item.description: arXiv:2605.30415v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We investigate how domain adaptation reshapes explanatory behavior in language models using historical cosmology as a controlled setting. In Phase 1, we train a small language model from scratch on a pre-Copernican corpus from which explicit...

item.title: Cross-Lingual Steering for Figurative Language Generation
item.description: arXiv:2605.30443v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Multilingual large language models can generate figurative language, but whether the internal signals driving this behavior are language-specific or reusable across languages is unclear. Using activation steering as a probe, we estimate a direction...

item.title: Can LLM Teams Play What? Where? When?
item.description: arXiv:2605.30459v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) remain limited on tasks requiring indirect reasoning, cultural knowledge, and coordinated hypothesis testing. We investigate whether team-based interaction improves LLM performance in What? Where? When? (ChGK), a quiz game...

item.title: Unitree Files for IPO, Aiming to Become 'First Embodied Intelligence Stock'
item.description: Unitree Technology, a globally leading high-performance general-purpose robotics company, is set to have its initial public offering reviewed by the Shanghai St...

item.title: CATL Announces Sodium Battery Mass Production, Marking Historic Turning Point
item.description: CATL's chief scientist confirmed that the company will mass produce a series of sodium-ion battery products this year, moving ahead of its earlier timeline and signaling a historic inflection point for the sodium battery industry.

item.title: REDnote Launches AI Search Assistant 'Diandian' on PC
item.description: RED (Xiaohongshu) officially launched its AI search assistant "Diandian" on PC on May 29, accessible directly via a dedicated domain. The AI assistant transform...

item.title: ORBBEC Expands Beyond Robot Vision Into Physical AI and 3D Printing
item.description: ORBBEC (688322.SH), a pioneer in 3D vision perception, is rapidly expanding beyond its core robot vision business into multiple high-growth sectors including Ph...

item.title: Guangfan Technology Partners with Tencent Mobility for AI Wearable Integration
item.description: Guangfan Technology announced on May 29 a strategic partnership with Tencent Mobility, which will integrate Guangfan's AI-powered wearable sensing devices into ...

item.title: Dutch Authorities Dismantle Botnet Linked to 17 Million Infected Devices
item.description: Dutch authorities have announced the takedown of a botnet that enslaved millions of infected devices, including computers, tablets, smartphones, and IoT devices, to carry out malicious attacks. The bot network, per the Dutch Politie and the National Cyber Security Center (NCSC), consisted of at...

item.title: Durable Objects and Log Explorer issues
item.description: May 31, 07:30 UTC Monitoring - A fix has been implemented and we are monitoring the results. May 31, 07:28 UTC Update - Log Explorer is experiencing intermittent delays with recent logs showing up in queries. May 31, 06:42 UTC Investigating - Cloudflare is aware of, and investigating an issue with...

item.title: Issues with TLS certificates using Lets Encrypt CA
item.description: May 31, 03:16 UTC Investigating - Cloudflare is investigating issues with Let's Encrypt certificates. Some visitors may experience TLS connectivity issues due to potentially unsupported CA bundling for a subset of Cloudflare customers.Customers are advised to change to a different Certificate...

item.title: Custom Hostname API issue
item.description: May 31, 01:06 UTC Investigating - Cloudflare is investigating increased latency for customers using the Cloudflare for SaaS Custom Hostname API. Customers may experience slow responses while adding a new R2 subscription.Existing Custom Hostnames remain unaffected and are operating normally.

item.title: opus 4.7 elevated errors
item.description: May 31, 00:16 UTC Resolved - This incident has been resolved. May 30, 22:58 UTC Investigating - We are currently investigating this issue.

item.title: Russian Spies Are Aggressively Seeking Western Technology as Sanctions Bite, Officials Say
item.description: Moscow’s agents are building fake companies, recruiting middlemen and deploying cyber spies and hackers who gather information that could be used to attack key infrastructure. The post Russian Spies Are Aggressively Seeking Western Technology as Sanctions Bite, Officials Say appeared first on...

item.title: Exploit Code Published for Critical Flowise RCE Vulnerability
item.description: The one-click vulnerability allows attackers to execute arbitrary code on self-hosted Flowise servers by tricking users into importing a malicious chatflow. The post Exploit Code Published for Critical Flowise RCE Vulnerability appeared first on SecurityWeek.

item.title: Increased errors when accessing Workers secrets
item.description: May 30, 14:52 UTC Update - We are continuing to investigate this issue. May 30, 14:51 UTC Investigating - Cloudflare Secrets Store users may see increased errors when accessing secrets

item.title: PAN-OS GlobalProtect Authentication Bypass (CVE-2026-0257) Under Active Exploitation
item.description: Palo Alto Networks has warned that a recently disclosed medium-severity security flaw impacting PAN-OS and Prisma Access has come under active exploitation in the wild. The vulnerability, tracked as CVE-2026-0257 (CVSS score: 7.8), refers to a case of authentication bypass that could be exploited...

item.title: [AINews] Founders and Forward Deployed Engineers
item.description: a quiet day lets us highlight the new AIE WF focuses

item.title: Elevated errors for Claude Opus 4.8
item.description: May 29, 19:12 UTC Resolved - This issue has been resolved. May 29, 18:55 UTC Monitoring - A fix has been deployed for Claude Opus 4.8 and success rates have returned to normal. Users saw elevated errors on requests to the model from 18:16–18:42 UTC. May 29, 18:35 UTC Investigating - We are...

item.title: ChatGPhish Vulnerability Turns ChatGPT Web Summaries Into a Phishing Surface
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed details of a vulnerability in OpenAI ChatGPT that leverages the artificial intelligence (AI) assistant's implicit trust in Markdown links and images to trigger prompt injections and open the door to phishing attacks. The technique has been codenamed...

item.title: HTTP Rollups delays
item.description: May 29, 17:24 UTC Resolved - This incident has been resolved. May 29, 16:41 UTC Investigating - Reporting and analytics for HTTP requests rollups is delayed. Edge services are still fully operational, just analytics are delayed. We are working to mitigate this problem. More updates to follow...

item.title: In Other News: Trump Mobile Data Breach, FIFA World Cup Phishing, CISA Responds to Supply Chain Attacks
item.description: Noteworthy stories that might have slipped under the radar: Trump Mobile exposes customer data, phishers target the 2026 FIFA World Cup, CISA responds to recent supply chain attacks. The post In Other News: Trump Mobile Data Breach, FIFA World Cup Phishing, CISA Responds to Supply Chain Attacks...

item.title: Charter Communications Data Breach Could Impact Nearly 5 Million
item.description: The notorious ShinyHunters extortion group leaked over 42 million records allegedly stolen from Charter in April. The post Charter Communications Data Breach Could Impact Nearly 5 Million appeared first on SecurityWeek.

item.title: Attackers Use LLM Agent for Post-Exploitation After Marimo CVE-2026-39987 Exploit
item.description: An unknown threat actor has been observed using a large language model (LLM) agent to conduct post-compromise actions after obtaining initial access following the exploitation of a publicly-accessible Marimo network using a recently disclosed vulnerability. "The attacker compromised an...

item.title: MokN Raises $15 Million for Phish-Back Platform
item.description: MokN's platform deploys realistic decoy access points to lure attackers into revealing compromised credentials, enabling organizations to respond before abuse occurs. The post MokN Raises $15 Million for Phish-Back Platform appeared first on SecurityWeek.

item.title: Users May Experience Issues Accessing ChatGPT
item.description: Status: ResolvedAll impacted services have now fully recovered.Affected components Connectors/Apps (Operational) Voice mode (Operational) Search (Operational) Deep Research (Operational) ChatGPT Atlas (Operational) Login (Operational) File uploads (Operational) Conversations (Operational)...

item.title: The Download: unlocking lithium and controlling Ebola
item.description: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. How a new extraction process could unlock the world’s lithium A new method for extracting lithium could cut costs and emissions from one of the...

item.title: New Russian-Linked GREYVIBE Targets Ukraine with AI-Powered Cyberattacks
item.description: A previously undocumented threat actor dubbed GREYVIBE has been attributed to ongoing and persistent attacks targeting Ukraine and Ukraine-related entities since at least August 2025. GREYVIBE, per WithSecure, is assessed to be a Russian-speaking group operating broadly in the Russian time zone,...

item.title: The deadly Ebola outbreak is proving difficult to control
item.description: The alert was raised on May 5. Four health-care workers in the Ituri Province of the Democratic Republic of the Congo had died from an unknown illness within four days. Rapid response teams were sent to investigate, and tests at a research center in Kinshasa revealed the culprit: the Bundibugyo...

item.title: How the Pope’s Magnifica Humanitas offers a template for individuals to meet the AI moment
item.description: Pope Leo XIV’s new encyclical on artificial intelligence includes a statement that warrants serious attention from technologists and policymakers: “Technology is never neutral.” Magnifica Humanitas (“Magnificent Humanity”) is a clarion call to all people to act with courage and solidarity as we...

item.title: Elevated errors on Claude Opus 4.8
item.description: May 29, 08:45 UTC Resolved - This incident has been resolved. May 29, 08:39 UTC Monitoring - A fix has been implemented and we are monitoring the results. May 29, 08:30 UTC Investigating - We are currently investigating this issue.

item.title: Azure - West US 2 (Washington): INC0157956
item.description: May 29, 07:45 UTC Identified - Current status: We've identified an issue with a third-party cloud platform, and we're coordinating with the provider to develop and implement a fix to restore service. We'll provide another update within 60 minutes.Customer experience: Customers hosted in the...

item.title: Users may encounter issues with conversations
item.description: Status: MonitoringWe have applied the mitigation and are monitoring the recovery.Affected components Conversations (Degraded performance)

item.title: Users may encounter issues logging in or creating an account
item.description: Status: MonitoringWe have applied the mitigation and are monitoring the recovery.Affected components Login (Degraded performance) Login (Degraded performance)

item.title: [AINews] Anthropic raises $965B Series H, releases Opus 4.8 and Dynamic Workflows/ultracode
item.description: Total Anthropic victory!

item.title: Profiling in PyTorch (Part 1): A Beginner's Guide to torch.profiler
Business plan subscription checkout issues on web and mobile web
item.description: Status: InvestigatingSome users may be unable to complete Business plan subscription checkouts on web and mobile web. We are investigating the issue for the listed services.

item.title: Disruption with Copilot Cloud Agent and Copilot Code Review
item.description: May 28, 20:41 UTC Resolved - This incident has been resolved. Thank you for your patience and understanding as we addressed this issue. A detailed root cause analysis will be shared as soon as it is available. May 28, 20:06 UTC Update - Open AI models are currently unavailable. We are shifting...
